About.title: My Journey
About.subtitle: Inspiring movement, fostering balance.
About.p1: I am a dedicated yoga instructor with over 8 years of experience leading classes at top-tier yoga centers. My practice is built on the belief that yoga is a highly personal journey.
About.p2: Before dedicating my life to yoga, I worked extensively in the hospitality and insurance industries. This background instilled in me a deep commitment to customer excellence, satisfaction, and personalized care.
About.p3: Today, alongside my studio work, I offer exclusive private classes. My private clients—often busy professionals or individuals seeking focused improvement—come to me purely through word-of-mouth recommendations.

Testimonials.title: Client Stories
Testimonials.subtitle: Experiences from my private students and studio partners.
Testimonials.r1: Her private sessions are a game-changer. Despite my chaotic work schedule, she customizes every hour to help me de-stress and build core strength.
Testimonials.r2: An absolute professional. Her background in customer service really shows in how she anticipates what her students need.
Testimonials.r3: I've improved my alignment more in 3 months of private lessons than in 2 years of group classes.
Testimonials.r4: Consistently one of the highest-rated instructors at our center. Her classes are always full, and her energy is unmatched.
Testimonials.r5: A reliable, deeply knowledgeable instructor who brings a premium, hospitality-level experience to our wellness programs.
